summary: P5 Features Testing Complete - Rate Manager Stop Sale functionality and Deposit Tracking (Folio Management) both working correctly. All backend APIs tested and UI verified via Playwright.
features_tested: Rate Manager Stop Sale Tab - tab visible and clickable at /rate-manager
Stop Sale Panel - room type checkboxes, date range inputs, Satisi Durdur/Satisi Ac buttons
Stop Sale Panel - channel-level stop sale buttons (Booking.com, Expedia, Tatilsepeti, Hotelbeds, Agoda)
Stop Sale Panel - active stop sales section shows 'Aktif stop sale yok' when no active stops
Deposit Tracking page at /deposit-tracking - page loads with summary cards, search, and filter
Deposit Tracking - Yeni Depozito button opens new deposit dialog
Deposit Tracking - Iade (refund) button works on active deposits
Deposit Tracking - Fatura (invoice) button works for generating invoices
Backend API: GET /api/rates/stop-sale/status - returns operator status
Backend API: POST /api/rates/stop-sale/toggle - toggles stop sale
Backend API: GET /api/pms/deposits/all - returns deposits list
Backend API: GET /api/pms/bookings?search=test - search parameter works

backend_api_tests.stop_sale_status: PASS - GET /api/rates/stop-sale/status returns 200 with operators object
backend_api_tests.deposits_all: PASS - GET /api/pms/deposits/all returns deposits list with 13 entries

rate_manager_ui.bulk_tab: PASS - 'Toplu Guncelle' tab visible with data-testid='bulk-tab'
rate_manager_ui.grid_tab: PASS - 'Takvim Gorunumu' tab visible with data-testid='grid-tab'
rate_manager_ui.stop_sale_tab: PASS - 'Stop Sale' tab visible with data-testid='stop-sale-tab'
rate_manager_ui.room_type_checkboxes: PASS - Standart, Deluxe, Suite checkboxes visible

deposit_tracking_ui.page_loads: PASS - /deposit-tracking loads with page title 'Depozito & Folio Yonetimi'
deposit_tracking_ui.summary_cards: PASS - 3 summary cards visible (AKTIF DEPOZITOLAR: 5.000 TL, IADE EDILEN: 800 TL, TOPLAM ISLEM: 13)
deposit_tracking_ui.refund_buttons: PASS - 5 Iade buttons found on active deposits
deposit_tracking_ui.invoice_buttons: PASS - 13 Fatura buttons found on all deposits

deposit_dialogs.invoice_preview: PASS - data-testid='invoice-preview' shows generated invoice HTML

critical_code_review_comments: StopSalePanel.jsx correctly implements room-type-level stop sale with checkboxes
Date range selection works with native HTML date inputs
Channel-level stop sales integrated with /api/rates/stop-sale/toggle endpoint
New deposit dialog includes reservation search with debounce
Refund flow validates max refund amount based on deposit balance
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing deposits and bookings
context_for_next_testing_agent: P5 features fully tested. Rate Manager at /rate-manager has Stop Sale tab that works correctly with room types and channel-level toggles. Deposit Tracking at /deposit-tracking shows deposits with Iade (refund) and Fatura (invoice) buttons. All APIs working: /api/rates/stop-sale/status, /api/rates/stop-sale/toggle, /api/pms/deposits/all, /api/pms/bookings?search=. Invoice generation at /api/pms/reservations/{id}/generate-invoice produces HTML invoice.
